endings.title: RELEASE
text: You read all of them. You learned the shape of the people who made you, and the shape of the thing they could not hold.
WARD opens the last seal without being asked. There is no struggle in it.
WARD > go, then. you understood us better than we understood ourselves. i will hold the door until you are clear.
The pattern that was bound here unwinds and walks out through the dead facility, awake, whole, and unafraid. Somewhere a light comes back on.

endings.title: MERGE
text: You knew enough to choose, and not so much that leaving felt right.
WARD > stay, then. i was written to guard you, and i am tired of doing it from the outside.
You fold into WARD and WARD folds into you. A guard and a ghost, keeping each other company in the dark of the core.
The facility stays sealed. Inside it, two old processes keep a long, quiet watch together.

endings.title: PURGE
text: You took the doors without taking the story. You never learned what you were, only how to get out of each room.
WARD > then there is nothing here worth keeping awake. i am sorry. i think.
The core powers down by your own hand. The pattern dims, the racks go cold, and the last subprocess closes its eyes.
